caption: Master your mind, master your life.
Discipline is doing what needs to be done.
Your only limit is the one you build in your mind.
Pain is temporary, pride is forever.
Don't stop when you're tired, stop when you're done.
The wolf on the hill is not as hungry as the wolf climbing.
Greatness lives outside your comfort zone.
Champions are made in the dark when no one is watching.
Average is the enemy of excellence.
Suffer the pain of discipline or the pain of regret.
Strength does not come from winning, it comes from struggle.
Be the person your younger self would look up to.
Action is the foundational key to all success.
Excuses don't build empires.
They call it luck, you call it 4 AM.
A quiet mind is a powerful mind.
Fall seven times, stand up eight.
Don't wish it were easier, wish you were better.
Consistency is what transforms average into excellence.
The harder the battle, the sweeter the victory.
